summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Logi3A Soluções educational system. Backend APIs fully functional with minor status code fix applied. Frontend loads correctly with all navigation, CRUD operations, dashboard charts, and filtering working as expected.

fixed_issues.issue: Returned status 200 instead of 201 for create operations
Returned status 200 instead of 201 for create operations

ui_bugs.issue: Modal dialog doesn't auto-close after successful form submission
ui_bugs.workaround: User can click 'Cancelar' to close manually

passed_tests: Backend API health check and root endpoints
Materials CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete)
Readings CRUD operations with filtering by type, operation, student
Statistics endpoint returning all required fields
Frontend home page loading with all action cards
Navigation between all pages (Home, Dashboard, Materials, History, QR Scanner, Barcode Scanner)
Dashboard displaying statistics with charts (bar charts and pie charts)
Materials table listing with search functionality
Materials CRUD interface with form validation
History page with search and filtering capabilities
Integration between frontend and backend APIs
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix modal dialog auto-close behavior after successful form submission in Materials page. The dialog should automatically close and refresh the materials list after successful creation/update.
